mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_session_system_prompt (id, session_id, user_id, serial_number, system_prompt) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{serialNumber}, #{systemPrompt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, serial_number, system_prompt, create_time, update_time FROM ai_chat_session_system_prompt WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND serial_number > 0 -- 新增：仅查询序列号大于0的记录 ORDER BY serial_number DESC LIMIT 1
